headline: Aon Expands Tech Investments With VIPR Partnership for Reinsurance
summary: Aon taps VIPR Solutions in a multi-year deal to automate delegated authority processes across its global reinsurance platform and boost digital transformation and efficiency.

raw.headline: Aon Expands Tech Investments With VIPR Partnership for Reinsurance
raw.summary: Aon taps VIPR Solutions in a multi-year deal to automate delegated authority processes across its global reinsurance platform and boost digital transformation and efficiency.

headline: Chubb set as main U.S. insurer for Persian Gulf shipping amid Iran war
summary: The insurance giant will work with the U.S. Development Finance Corporation to help backstop shipping.

raw.headline: Chubb set as main U.S. insurer for Persian Gulf shipping amid Iran war
raw.summary: The insurance giant will work with the U.S. Development Finance Corporation to help backstop shipping.

headline: Is Aon’s (AON) Tech-Focused Leadership Shuffle Quietly Reframing Its Long-Term Competitive Edge?
summary: Aon has reshaped its senior leadership, with Anne Corona now CEO of North America, Lori Goltermann taking on the Vice Chair role into 2027, and Farheen Dam becoming CEO of Enterprise Clients and Chief Client Officer, while also advancing analytics partnerships and stablecoin settlement initiatives across its insurance and reinsurance businesses. These moves highlight how Aon is tying leadership succession to technology-driven offerings, from delegated authority automation to clinically...
